options.text: A) 2 buoyant rescue quoits attached not less than 30 m buoyant line
B) 2 buoyant rescue quoits attached not less than 15 m buoyant line
C) 1 buoyant rescue quoits attached not less than 30 m buoyant line
D) 1 buoyant rescue quoits attached not less than 15 m buoyant line

explanation: LSA Code requires that every life raft is equipped with 2 buoyant rescue quoits attached to not less than 30 meters of buoyant line, used to reach and retrieve survivors from the water.
